ddls:
CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "simulation_name" TEXT /* Name of the simulation */,
  "simulation_type" TEXT /* Type of simulation (e.g., dislocation dynamics, strain analysis) */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material being simulated */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the simulation was uploaded */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the simulation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the simulation (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the simulation */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the simulation */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date and time of the last modification to the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the material */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of material (e.g., metal, alloy, composite) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the material */,
  "density" REAL /* Density of the material */,
  "melting_point" REAL /* Melting point of the material */,
  "youngs_modulus" REAL /* Young's modulus of the material */,
  "poissons_ratio" REAL /* Poisson's ratio of the material */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the material */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date and time of the last modification to the material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., temperature, strain rate) */,
  "parameter_value" REAL /* Value of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the parameter value */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the parameter */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date and time of the last modification to the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_parameters_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_parameters_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dislocation_dynamics_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the data belongs to */,
  "time" REAL /* Time step of the simulation */,
  "cell_dislocations" REAL /* Cell dislocations */,
  "effective_strain_avg" REAL /* Effective strain average */,
  "vonmises_stress" REAL /* Von Mises stress */,
  "wall_dislocations" REAL /* Wall dislocations */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at the time step */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Pressure at the time step */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the data point */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date and time of the last modification to the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dislocation_dynamics_data_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dislocation_dynamics_data_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strain_analysis_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the data belongs to */,
  "time" REAL /* Time step of the simulation */,
  "strain_rate" REAL /* Strain rate */,
  "stress" REAL /* Stress */,
  "plastic_strain" REAL /* Plastic strain */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at the time step */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Pressure at the time step */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the data point */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date and time of the last modification to the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strain_analysis_data_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strain_analysis_data_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., department, institution) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the user account */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date and time of the last modification to the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the simulation */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the simulation was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the simulation */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the simulation */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the log entry */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date and time of the last modification to the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being visualized */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., line plot, scatter plot) */,
  "image_file" TEXT /* File path to the visualization image */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date and time of the last modification to the visualization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES dislocation_dynamics_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., regression, classification) */,
  "training_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training data used for the model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the model */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date and time of the last modification to the model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_machine_learning_models_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_machine_learning_models_training_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("training_data_id") REFERENCES dislocation_dynamics_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used for analysis */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being analyzed */,
  "result_value" REAL /* Value of the result */,
  "result_description" TEXT /* Description of the result */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the result */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date and time of the last modification to the result */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the result */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_results_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_results_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES dislocation_dynamics_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "publication_name" TEXT /* Name of the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the publication entry */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date and time of the last modification to the publication entry */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the publication has been cited */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
